name: mnemonic
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y zstd && curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && npm ci
postAttachCommand: bash -c 'ollama serve > /tmp/ollama.log 2>&1 & for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags >/dev/null && break; sleep 1; done; ollama list | grep -q nomic-embed-text-v2-moe || ollama pull nomic-embed-text-v2-moe'
